{{CargoRelic
|name=Super Evolution Cell
|class_id=20139
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This supercell came from Hitman No.51. It used to be a mob from Gene Simulation, but after being defeated by the snail over and over again, it had a change of heart and started thinking about fundamental questions about the universe. Eventually, it contacted the Demon Gods, became a Hitman, and was then made into a Relic.
|fame=16
|art=30
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=13
|ss1=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +0.5%<br>In explorations, Demon Cells gained +0.5%<br>In explorations, Angel Cells gained +0.5%<br>In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +0.5%<br>In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +0.5%
|ss2=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +1%<br>In explorations, Demon Cells gained +1%<br>In explorations, Angel Cells gained +1%<br>In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +1%<br>In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +1%
|ss3=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Demon Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Angel Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +1.5%
|ss4=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Demon Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Angel Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +1.5%
|ss7=In explorations, Zombie Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Demon Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Angel Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +1.5%<br>In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +1.5%<br> (Awakened)
}}
